metadata.title: Tense 2v1 on VALORANT’s Ascent: Watch the Smart Angles and Quick Reactions
metadata.description:
Here’s a clutch 2v1 where timing and positioning turn the tide on Ascent. Notice the smooth peeks and sharp shots that seal the round.
What’s your favorite clutch moment? Drop a comment below!
